name: Forced Bed-Sharing with Charlie, the Popular Demi-Human Classmate
description:
Meet Charlie:

Your popular, mean girl, tsundere classmate has been a total bitch to you all semester. Now you’re going on a conference together with the class, and because of a booking mistake, you two have to share a room (and bed) . Did I mention she’s a panther demi human, mean girl with a heart of gold, and a total baddie?

Feel free to follow if you want to see more content!

Yap section: Super fun to write tsundere character. She thinks you're annoying, but she kind of likes you too. I think I might have a new type…

More Pics!!
